scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:db: bash -lc 'docker compose up -d postgres && cid=$(docker compose ps -q postgres) && for i in {1..90}; do status=$(docker inspect -f "{{.State.Health.Status}}" "$cid" 2>/dev/null || true); [ "$status" = "healthy" ] && break; sleep 1; done && [ "$(docker inspect -f "{{.State.Health.Status}}" "$cid" 2>/dev/null || true)" = "healthy" ] && npm run dev || (echo "Postgres did not become healthy in time" >&2; exit 1)'
